text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One winter day, just before the holiday season...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Happy Holidays!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year's Arima Kinen happens to coincide with
the festivities, so the two of us are celebrating in
advance.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'd say any time's a good time to celebrate the
holidays! What's important is enjoyin' yourself!
choice_data_list:
How do you usually celebrate around this time
of year?

How do you usually celebrate around this time
of year?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Let me think...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, back at home, the town would host a big
blowout banquet, and I'd participate every year.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Everyone from the adults to the kiddos come
together to eat and make merry... What's a party
without a feast and a good crowd, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
After comin' here, though, I usually celebrate with
the academy folks. There's always lots of people
holdin' parties.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And each one's always fun enough to rival my
hometown's parties. I never get bored around this
time!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But yeah, this year, I'm spendin' the holidays with
you, Boss.
choice_data_list: Must be a bit shabby by comparison, huh?
Must be a bit shabby by comparison, huh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But yeah, this year, I'm spendin' the holidays with
you, Boss.
choice_data_list: Must be a bit shabby by comparison, huh?
Must be a bit shabby by comparison, huh?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya talkin' about?! Hearin' you were willin'
to party with me practically had me jumpin' with
joy!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Plus, look at how much ya splurged on this feast
we've got here. Today's not lackin' in festival flair
in the slightest!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Plus, look at how much ya splurged on this feast
we've got here. Today's not lackin' in festival flair
in the slightest!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you know me well enough to include a sushi
platter. Great job addin' some inari sushi too. A
trainer of culture, I see!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's dig in before the food gets cold!
Happy Holidays, and cheers to a future win at the
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To kick off the party, we reminisce on the time
we've spent together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the day we met, to our countless memories
of merriment, we talk and talk over the delicious
food...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whoa, look at the time! It really flew by, huh?!
choice_data_list:
We'll be getting up early tomorrow. Let's call it
a day.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Agreed. Besides, I wanna get in some last-minute
trainin' before the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You know...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinkin'. Our time together has really
gone by in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinkin'. Our time together has really
gone by in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But... that just goes to show how turbulent and
amazin' this journey's been!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoops, there I go gettin' all serious and
sentimental. Way to spoil the festive mood.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss, know the best way to shake off the
blues of a festival havin' to wrap up?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Boss, know the best way to shake off the
blues of a festival havin' to wrap up?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: It's simple. Ya start plannin' for the next one!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
How can ya feel glum when you've got another
festival to look forward to?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So, how's another celebration after the Arima
Kinen sound?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a victory party, a second holiday shindig,
and a New Year's bash all wrapped in one! Hehe.
We won't have any time to mope!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ah, but for the plans to work out...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'll have to make sure I win the Arima Kinen!
choice_data_list: I know you can do it!
I know you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We conclude our modest holiday get-together
before the big showdown on a happy note.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay, now that we've agreed to plan another
celebration...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Here, I got ya a present.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I was hopin' for that kinda reaction! I
prepared it just for you, so ya can't turn it down.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sure ya can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Removing the wrapping, I find a wooden box with
a lock and key!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The exterior is smooth to the touch and carefully
coated in a thin layer of lacquer with a small fox
etched into the lid!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's nothin' big, but you can use it to keep your
trinkets and things! I thought it might help with
your desk organization.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Well... ya know. Everybody's got a hobby, right?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Can't really call it a holiday get-together without
gifts, right? I worked on it in between trainin'
sessions, so it's nothin' fancy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says that, but this level of quality is on par
with a store-bought item. I can't believe it's
handmade!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C-c'mon, it's just a box. I shoulda gone with
something more fancy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at what's laid out over my desk and stash
the items in the box, including my stopwatch and
favorite pen.
choice_data_list: See? It all fits in there perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And I think that's 'bout the best thank-you gift I could
ask for...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We conclude our modest holiday get-together
before the big showdown on a happy note.
